title: potentilla supina subsp. costata
intro: Potentilla supina subsp. costata, also known as Five-fingered Cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Potentilla supina subsp. costata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies, tinctures, and salves, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
